description: Legal document. Probably a marriage contract (ketubba); similar formulae as in T-S NS J363 (PGPID 4329). Small fragment from the bottom. Mentions either "his son" or "the daughter of" the qāḍī known as Ibn Shaʿra, a certain Shabbetay, and a certain Sitt al-Tujjār. The scribe's hand may be known.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
